properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 90/18
BARENTS SEA

SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS BY R/V HARRIER EXPLORER TOWING STEAMER 6000M LONG WITH SPEED 
4 KNOTS FROM 29TH JULY UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE IN THE AREA BOUNDED BY:
A. 71-41.5N 21-10.9E
B. 72-17.2N 22-50.4E
C. 72-05.1N 24-10.7E
D. 71-28.4N 24-31.9E
E. 71-23.5N 21-21.9E
GUARD VESSEL HUNTER IS IN ESCORT. 
ALL VESSEL ARE REQUESTED TO GIVE WIDE BIRTH OF MINIMUM 2NM AHEAD AND 5NM ASTERN OF 
HARRIER EXPLORER.
VHF  WORKING CHANNELS 16 AND 67
